scenes.prompt: Animated scene: a curious cat silhouette approaches a glowing gate covered in ivy. The ivy parts with particle effects as the cat gets closer. Light beams break through the opening gate.
scenes.narration: Whiskers discovered a hidden gate covered in ivy.

scenes.prompt: Animated scene: colors explode outward from center of screen in concentric rings. Flower shapes bloom and grow. Butterflies made of geometric shapes flutter across. Streams of blue light flow upward.
scenes.narration: On the other side was the most magical garden she had ever seen.

scenes.description: The ancient tree grants Whiskers a wish
scenes.prompt: Animated scene: a large tree silhouette with silver outline grows from bottom center. Text 'The Garden of Dreams' fades in above it letter by letter. A small glowing orb descends from the tree branches to the bottom of the frame.
scenes.narration: The tree gave Whiskers a glowing seed to share the magic.
